/usr/bin/ar qc libscreepsxx.a CMakeFiles/screepsxx.dir/src/ConstructionSite.cpp.o CMakeFiles/screepsxx.dir/src/Creep.cpp.o CMakeFiles/screepsxx.dir/src/Deposit.cpp.o CMakeFiles/screepsxx.dir/src/Flag.cpp.o CMakeFiles/screepsxx.dir/src/Game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/screepsxx.dir/src/JS.cpp.o CMakeFiles/screepsxx.dir/src/Memory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/screepsxx.dir/src/Object.cpp.o CMakeFiles/screepsxx.dir/src/OwnedStructure.cpp.o CMakeFiles/screepsxx.dir/src/PathFinder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/screepsxx.dir/src/RawMemory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/screepsxx.dir/src/Resource.cpp.o CMakeFiles/screepsxx.dir/src/Room.cpp.o CMakeFiles/screepsxx.dir/src/RoomObject.cpp.o CMakeFiles/screepsxx.dir/src/RoomPosition.cpp.o CMakeFiles/screepsxx.dir/src/RoomTerrain.cpp.o CMakeFiles/screepsxx.dir/src/RoomVisual.cpp.o CMakeFiles/screepsxx.dir/src/Ruin.cpp.o CMakeFiles/screepsxx.dir/src/Source.cpp.o CMakeFiles/screepsxx.dir/src/Store.cpp.o CMakeFiles/screepsxx.dir/src/Structure.cpp.o CMakeFiles/screepsxx.dir/src/StructureContainer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/screepsxx.dir/src/StructureController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/screepsxx.dir/src/StructureExtension.cpp.o CMakeFiles/screepsxx.dir/src/StructureExtractor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/screepsxx.dir/src/StructureLink.cpp.o CMakeFiles/screepsxx.dir/src/StructureRampart.cpp.o CMakeFiles/screepsxx.dir/src/StructureRoad.cpp.o CMakeFiles/screepsxx.dir/src/StructureSpawn.cpp.o CMakeFiles/screepsxx.dir/src/StructureStorage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/screepsxx.dir/src/StructureTerminal.cpp.o CMakeFiles/screepsxx.dir/src/StructureTower.cpp.o CMakeFiles/screepsxx.dir/src/StructureWall.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libscreepsxx.a
